subject: A humanoid figure standing atop a massive dark-winged demon in flight, surrounded by fire and lightning, holding a staff aloft
description: A small humanoid figure stands triumphantly on the back of an enormous dark-winged creature mid-flight, holding a long staff or polearm aloft. The figure is engulfed in a burst of warm golden-orange fire that lights their back and the creature's wingspan from behind. Blue-white lightning crackles in the upper sky. The winged creature below is massive — dark, leathery wings spread wide, clawed feet visible at the bottom — with a horned head. The contrast between the blinding warm fire and the cold blue sky creates dramatic chiaroscuro. The scale difference between rider and beast emphasizes the audacity of the scene. Flavor text credits Rakdos speaking to Gideon, indicating the rider is likely Gideon Jura.
foreground: Humanoid figure standing on the back of a massive dark-winged demon, holding a staff aloft, surrounded by fire
background: Stormy blue-grey sky with lightning crackles
emotion: audacious defiance — figure standing unmoved atop an overwhelming force
